name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: A central sector scheme that provides income support to all landholder farmer families across the country to enable them to take care of expenses related to agriculture and allied activities.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year, transferred in three equal installments of ₹2,000 directly into the bank accounts of the beneficiaries.
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

requiredDocuments.name: Aadhaar Card
requiredDocuments.description: For identity verification.

requiredDocuments.name: Landholding Document / RoR
requiredDocuments.description: Record of Rights (Khasra/Khatauni) proving cultivable land ownership.

requiredDocuments.name: Bank Passbook
requiredDocuments.description: Active bank account copy linked with Aadhaar for DBT.

applicationProcess: Visit the official PM-KISAN portal (pmkisan.gov.in).
Click on the 'New Farmer Registration' link under Farmer Corner.
Select Rural or Urban Farmer Registration and enter Aadhaar number.
Fill out personal details, address, land size, and bank credentials.
Upload land and Aadhaar documents and submit for state approval.

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: The largest health assurance scheme in the world which aims to provide free health cover up to Rs. 5 Lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization to poor and vulnerable families.
benefits: Health insurance coverage up to ₹5,000,000 per family per year, covering pre and post-hospitalization costs.
department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

requiredDocuments.name: Aadhaar Card
requiredDocuments.description: For identity proof.

requiredDocuments.name: Ration Card
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of family structure and income status.

requiredDocuments.name: Income Certificate
requiredDocuments.description: Official proof that family income is below threshold limits.

applicationProcess: Verify eligibility on the Am I Eligible portal (pmjay.gov.in).
Visit a nearby Ayushman Mitra kiosk at any empaneled government/private hospital.
Present Aadhaar Card and Ration Card to the operator for verification.
Complete biometric registration to obtain your Ayushman Card.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: A small deposit scheme for girl children, launched as a part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign, offering tax benefits and high interest rates to secure their education and marriage.
benefits: High interest rate (currently 8.2% p.a.) compounding annually, with tax exemptions under Section 80C.
department: Department of Posts / Ministry of Finance

requiredDocuments.name: Birth Certificate of Girl Child
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of age and gender issued by municipal authority.

requiredDocuments.name: Parent/Guardian ID Proof
requiredDocuments.description: Aadhaar Card or PAN Card of the primary account operator.

requiredDocuments.name: Address Proof
requiredDocuments.description: Electricity bill or utility bill of parent/guardian.

applicationProcess: Obtain the Sukanya Samriddhi account opening form from a Post Office or bank.
Fill out details of the girl child and parent/guardian operator.
Attach girl child's birth certificate and guardian's KYC documents.
Submit form with a minimum initial deposit of ₹250.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: A pension scheme targeted at unorganized sector workers to provide them social security in their old age, offering guaranteed pension amounts based on their subscription contribution age.
benefits: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after attaining age 60.
department: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA)

requiredDocuments.name: Aadhaar Card
requiredDocuments.description: Primary identity verification documents.

requiredDocuments.name: Savings Bank Account
requiredDocuments.description: Mandatory for auto-debit of subscription installments.

applicationProcess: Approach the bank branch or post office where your savings account is held.
Fill out the APY registration form with your preferred pension slab (₹1000 - ₹5000).
Provide bank account details and authorize auto-debit consent.
Ensure sufficient balance is maintained in the account for monthly debits.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: An initiative by the Government of India to provide housing for all in urban areas, offering interest subsidies on home loans to families belonging to weaker sections.
benefits: Up to ₹2.67 Lakh interest subsidy on home loans under Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS).
department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

requiredDocuments.name: Aadhaar Card
requiredDocuments.description: Required for all family members.

requiredDocuments.name: Income Certificate / Form 16
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of annual family income classification.

requiredDocuments.name: Affidavit of No Property Ownership
requiredDocuments.description: A declaration stating no family member owns a pucca house in India.

applicationProcess: Access the PMAY-U online portal (pmay-urban.gov.in).
Select 'Citizen Assessment' and choose the appropriate application category.
Enter Aadhaar details to verify identity and load the application form.
Provide income details, bank credentials, and upload files.
Submit and track application using the generated Application ID.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
description: Provides collateral-free loans to non-corporate, non-farm small and micro enterprises to facilitate credit availability for self-employment and small businesses.
benefits: Loans up to ₹10 Lakhs split into Shishu (up to ₹50k), Kishor (₹50k-5L), and Tarun (₹5L-10L) categories without collateral.

requiredDocuments.name: Identity and Address Proof
requiredDocuments.description: Aadhaar, Voter ID, or Passport copy.

requiredDocuments.name: Business Registration Certificate
requiredDocuments.description: Udyam registration or shop license proving ownership.

requiredDocuments.name: Project Quotation / Business Plan
requiredDocuments.description: Detailed report outlining usage of loan funds.

applicationProcess: Prepare a business plan and select loan category (Shishu, Kishor, or Tarun).
Visit any public, private, or co-operative bank offering Mudra loans.
Submit the completed application form along with business registration papers.
Upon evaluation of business viability, the bank sanctions credit limit.

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
description: A food security welfare scheme introduced during the pandemic to provide free food grains to eligible ration card holders to eliminate hunger.
benefits: 5 kg of free food grains (wheat or rice) per person per month in addition to subsidized grains.
department: Department of Food and Public Distribution

requiredDocuments.name: Ration Card
requiredDocuments.description: Essential document for family headcount validation.

requiredDocuments.name: Aadhaar Card
requiredDocuments.description: Identity verification document linked to ration database.

applicationProcess: Ensure ration card is seeded with Aadhaar for all family members.
Visit the local Fair Price Shop (ration depot) in your area.
Complete biometric verification at the point-of-sale (e-POS) terminal.
Collect the allocated free grain quotient along with regular supplies.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Promotes entrepreneurship at the grassroots level, specifically focusing on economic empowerment of women and Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) communities.
benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 Lakh and ₹1 Crore for setting up greenfield business enterprises.

requiredDocuments.name: Caste Certificate
requiredDocuments.description: Required to prove SC/ST status (not required for general category women).

requiredDocuments.name: Business Plan / Greenfield Project details
requiredDocuments.description: Document explaining the proposed business structure.

requiredDocuments.name: Address and Identity Proof
requiredDocuments.description: Aadhaar Card and utility bills.

applicationProcess: Visit the Stand-Up India portal (standupmitra.in) or go to a partner bank.
Register as a borrower and fill in project information details.
Select handholding support if business requires training or preparation.
Submit loan request for review and complete biometric / physical KYC.
